summary: BUILD 9 (Learning Engine) testing complete — 14/14 backend tests pass, all frontend tests pass. Learning endpoint returns correct structure, scheduler triggers work for all 3 ML jobs, gestiones create learning outcomes async, Settings shows 12 jobs with ML badges, CRM client page loads correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CFO badge (data-testid='cfo-alert-badge') is correctly conditional — only shows when cfoAlertCount > 0. No active CFO alerts in test environment, so badge hidden is expected behavior.
Learning boxes (alerta-deterioro, learning-recomendacion) are correctly hidden with no patterns learned (DPD>0 client tested). Per spec this is correct behavior.
Minor HTML hydration warning: <span> inside <option> in CRMList select dropdowns — cosmetic only, no functional impact.
seed_data_creation: 2 gestiones registered on test3-lb001 during testing (whatsapp + llamada, resultado: no_contestó)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Build 9 fully tested. All 14 backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_build9.py pass. Key flows verified: GET /api/crm/{id}/learning returns recomendacion+alerta_deterioro, 3 ML scheduler jobs trigger OK with correct labels, gestiones create learning_outcomes via asyncio.create_task, Settings Alertas Scheduler tab shows '12 total — 3 de ML activos en BUILD 9' with ML badges on 3 jobs, Ejecutar button triggers toast, CRM client page navigates correctly and shows timeline. Learning boxes only appear when pattern conditions met (confianza>=0.6 or prob>0.60 with DPD=0) — hidden in fresh install is CORRECT. CFO badge conditional on cfoAlertCount>0.
